name: florges
flavor_texts: It claims exquisite flower gardens as its territory, and it obtains power from basking in the energy emitted by flowering plants.
In times long past, governors of castles would invite Florges to create flower gardens to embellish the castle domains.
It controls the flowers it grows. The petal blizzards that Florges triggers are overwhelming in their beauty and power.
Its life can span several hundred years. It’s said to devote its entire life to protecting gardens.
text: Florges is the Garden Pokémon. It is a fairy-type Pokémon. Abilities: flower-veil, symbiosis (hidden). Base stats — HP: 78, Attack: 65, Defense: 68, Sp. Atk: 112, Sp. Def: 154, Speed: 75. Evolution line: flabebe → floette → florges. Lore: It claims exquisite flower gardens as its territory, and it obtains power from basking in the energy emitted by flowering plants. In times long past, governors of castles would invite Florges to create flower gardens to embellish the castle domains. It controls the flowers it grows. The petal blizzards that Florges triggers are overwhelming in their beauty and power. Its life can span several hundred years. It’s said to devote its entire life to protecting gardens.
